step_rationale: Platelet inhibitor and endothelial function mediator; anti-thrombotic and cardioprotective effects across multiple cascade steps.
mechanism: Adenosine inhibits platelet activation and thrombus formation while promoting endothelial function and myocardial cardioprotection via ticagrelor-independent mechanisms.
